of the President Message The fiscal has been the the Commercial Bank of Ethiopia had maintained 2012/13 year year its continued excellence in its business growth and profitability, which | greatly pleased am all stakeholders and the general public. As result, the profit of the to to announce a gross Bank reached 8.6 billion Birr, by 7.9 percent the preceding fiscal up over year. This unprecedented level of profit registered the robust is owing to macroeconomic performance of the Ethiopian and seizing the opportunity it provided. economy Accordingly, the total income of the Bank reached Birr 13.7 billion, by Birr 2.2 billion up (18.6%) compared with the performance of the previous At the end of the fiscal year. year, the total of the Bank stood Birr 195.4 billion, while total deposit reached 154.4 assets at billion thus reflecting growth the preceding Birr, 28.7 percent a over year. On the other hand, the overall of the Bank has reached Birr 5.2 billion, showing expense an increase of 41.8 mainly due the substantial increase in interest (42.0%) percent to expense followed by general (32.9%). The latter’s increase is attributable branch to expense expansion. Human Resources The human development which has been developed by Frankfurt School strategy, resource of Finance and Management, is continued be implemented during the under review. to year Accordingly, five work plans have been drawn implement recommended strategic actions to including; technical assistance to implement the strategy, succession planning system; and retention; performance and training and engagement management system system development. While of the components of the strategic actions have been carried out, some others underway and will continue be implemented in the 2013/14 fiscal to are year. In addition, the CBE has continued its efforts towards strengthening its human capacity by providing various on-the -job and off-the-job training, recruiting additional and trained new employees well retaining existing staff through devising different incentives and as as benefit packages. Accordingly, total of 13,912 employees provided technical and a were developmental by both house and external and formal and training in trainers programs informal. Similarly, the bank continued give special emphasis recruiting qualified to on professionals. In the reporting period, recruitment of 2,235 employees net permanent was made raising employee strength to 15,007 by the end of the Fiscal year. 2.5.
